mapper.insert: INSERT INTO om_log_m ( actor_user_id, menu_cd, action_cd, message_key, resource_type, resource_id, detail, request_id, client_path, http_method, api_path, ip_addr, user_agent ) VALUES ( #{actorUserId}, #{menuCd}, #{actionCd}, #{messageKey}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, CAST(#{detailJson} AS jsonb), #{requestId}, #{clientPath}, #{httpMethod}, #{apiPath}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgent} )
